rag_rules: Generate AGREE annex blocks using only visible AADL features and connections as referenced in the model structure.
Place assumptions and guarantees in component type annexes; use implementation annexes only for assign statements tied to output features.
generic_rules: Use only explicitly exposed ports, constants, or declared variables in AGREE expressions — never infer or invent identifiers.
Ensure all expressions use AGREE scalar types: int, real, bool — never AADL property names or unit tokens as variables.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in annex agree {** ... **};
Use assume and guarantee for type-level contracts; use assign only in implementation scope for output bindings.
anti_patterns: Do not reference AADL properties (e.g., Period, Deadline) as if they are AGREE variables.
Do not place guarantees in implementation annexes or reference subcomponent paths in type-level annexes.
